RESULT: context PumpController_ClosePump inv: self.pcPre.mode = On implies self.pcPost.mode = Off
context ControlProgram::mode = Mode::Rescue implies wlmdFailure->notEmpty() and next(ControlProgram)->mode = Mode::Rescue
context SteamBoiler::valveOpen inv: self.valveOpen = 'Open' implies predecessor.valveOpen = 'Closed'
context SteamBoiler inv: self.valveOpen implies self.controlProgram.mode = Mode::Initialization
context PumpController::openPump() : pre() -> let pumpState = self.pump.mode in (pumpState = State::Off) implies (self.pump.mode = State::On)
map.allSpaces->forAll(s1, s2 | s1 <> s2 implies s1.name = s2.name)
conveyors->forAll(c | c.capacity >= c.piece->size()) and pieces->forAll(p | p.conveyor->size() = 1)
context Employee inv: self.manager->isEmpty() and self.managedBranchs->isEmpty() or self.manager->notEmpty() implies self.managedBranchs->notEmpty()
context Employee inv: if self.manager <> null then self.manager.salary > self.salary else true endif
context CarGroup::higher->forAll(higher = self) and context CarGroup::lower->forAll(lower = self)
context CarGroup::higher->notEmpty() implies self <> higher->head().higher and context CarGroup::lower->notEmpty() implies self <> lower->head().lower
context Coach inv: self.noOfSeats >= Trip->collect(passenger : Passenger | passenger)->size()
context Apple inv: self.label->isEmpty() implies true
context TypeVariable::type()->oclIsKindOf(EClass) and type()->isAbstract() implies false

context CREATE::parent
if parent->isTypeOf(EObjectReference) then
  parent.elements->size() = 1
else if parent->isTypeOf(VariableReference) and parent.referencedVariable->isTypeOf(QueryVariable) and parent.referencedVariable.result->isTypeOf(EObjectReference) then
  parent.referencedVariable.result.elements->size() = 1
endif
RAW_RESULT:
{
  "code": "context CREATE::parent
if parent->isTypeOf(EObjectReference) then
  parent.elements->size() = 1
else if parent->isTypeOf(VariableReference) and parent.referencedVariable->isTypeOf(QueryVariable) and parent.referencedVariable.result->isTypeOf(EObjectReference) then
  parent.referencedVariable.result.elements->size() = 1
endif
"
}

RESULT:
context s : SET
if s.referenceOwner->isTypeOf(EObjectReference) then
  self.referenceOwner.elements->size() = 1
else if s.referenceOwner->isTypeOf(VariableReference) and s.referenceOwner.referencedVariable.queryResult->isTypeOf(EObjectReference) then
  self.referenceOwner.referencedVariable.queryResult.elements->size() = 1
endif
RAW_RESULT:
{

if s.referenceOwner->isTypeOf(EObjectReference) then

else if s.referenceOwner->isTypeOf(VariableReference) and s.referenceOwner.referencedVariable.queryResult->isTypeOf(EObjectReference) then
  self.referenceOwner.referencedVariable.queryResult.elements->size() = 1
endif"
}

RESULT:
context MOVE::newParent
if newParent.oclIsTypeOf(EObjectReference)
then
newParent.elements->size() = 1
else if newParent.oclIsTypeOf(VariableReference) and newParent.referencedVariable.oclIsTypeOf(QueryVariable) and newParent.referencedVariable.queryResult.oclIsTypeOf(EObjectReference)
then
(newParent.referencedVariable.queryResult).elements->size() = 1
endif

context CrashedVehicle::crash : RoadTrafficAccident 
inv: crash->forAll(traveler | traveler->includes(victim))
context Worker::overloaded() : Boolean = self.project->select(p | p.status = #active and p.size = #big)->size() * 2 + self.project->select(p | p.status = #active and p.size = #medium)->size() <= 3

context Project inv: let requiredQualifications = self.required->select(q | q.status = Qualification::Met) in if self.status = ProjectStatus::Active then requiredQualifications->forAll(req | self.members->exists(m | m.qualifications->includes(req))) else true endif
context Feature inv: id >= 0 and id <= MAX_INT
context WorkSequence::linksToPredecessors->size() = linksToSuccessors->size() and self.linksToPredecessors->includes(self.successor) implies false

context WorkDefinition::name
  inv: name->notEmpty() and name->matches('^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$')

context PetriNet::name() : String
  ensures name->notEmpty() and name->matches('^[a-zA-Z_][a-zA-Z0-9_]*$')

context Place::name() : String
  let firstChar : Character = name->first()
  in
    firstChar->select( Char::isLetter() ) or
      firstChar = '_' and
      name->forAll( c | Char::isLetterOrDigit(c) or c = '_' )

context Arc inv: (self.successor->type = 'Transition' and self.predecessor->type = 'Place') or (self.successor->type = 'Place' and self.predecessor->type = 'Transition') and not (self.successor->type = self.predecessor->type)
context Library::books->forAll(b1 | b1.author = b2.author implies b1.title <> b2.title) forAll b1, b2 : Book | b1 <> b2 implies not (b1.author = b2.author and b1.title = b2.title)
context Fine inv: self.paymentDate->notEmpty() and self.paymentDate = self.loan.returnDate
TagElements->forAll(te | te.fragments->forAll(f | f.oclIsKindOf(TextElement) implies TextElements->exists(t | t.text = f.text)))

context TextElement::forEveryTextElementThereExistsATagElementWithSameTextContent
	let text = self.text
	exists (TagElement.allInstances()->forAll(t | t.fragments->exists(f | f.text = text)))

context Modifier::bodyDeclaration -> not null implies exists (BodyDeclaration | body = bodyDeclaration) and context Modifier::singleVariableDeclaration -> not null implies exists (SingleVariableDeclaration | singleVariableDeclaration = singleVariableDeclaration) and context Modifier::variableDeclarationStatement -> not null implies exists (VariableDeclarationStatement | variableDeclarationStatement = variableDeclarationStatement)

context MethodInvocation::methodInvocation
  inv: self.method->exists(method | method = self.method)
  and self.arguments->forAll(arg | arg.type = SingleVariableAccess implies arg.variable->exists(var | var = arg.variable))
